item.title: America sure is winning, huh?
item.description: Fp Edit: Well, I don't have the money to, but I can't avoid it, having to get an oil change. And last time I priced it, it's gone up nearly $15-$20 just in a month from the same place I was going to go to. I'm tired of struggling. Every day. I'm tired of the anxiety all this is causing. And I'm tired of them getting away with it.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: GovBrief Today #483
item.description: Michael Dell gave $6.25 billion to Donald Trump's signature children's accounts, and now the Pentagon has handed Dell a $9.7 billion contract. Trump personally told the country to go out and buy Dell, so the contract looks less like a competition than an order being filled. It is not the only one. ProPublica reported today that the White House steered a $620 million Pentagon loan to a startup partly owned by the president's son, Donald Trump Jr. The Pentagon insists both deals were won on the merits and that no company gets special treatment. But one of its own officials says the White House made the call, and a second loan for one of Don Jr.'s companies is already in the queue. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell your representatives to investigate both. I've emailed 7,597 stories over 483 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260528-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may28 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-mail-vote [3] https://go.govbrief.today/la-house [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-app [5] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-199 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-hoffman [7] https://go.govbrief.today/undercover-plates [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wsj-2 [9] https://go.govbrief.today/barrett-swatting [10] https://go.govbrief.today/delaney-arrests [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-currency [12] https://go.govbrief.today/freedom-concert [13] https://go.govbrief.today/dell-pentagon [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gold-horses [15] https://go.govbrief.today/vulcan-deal [16] https://go.govbrief.today/people-festival Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: It's big life change time!
item.description: My work was cutting a lot of jobs, but rather than just firing people randomly, they offered a severance package if you left voluntarily. The goal was to get the old crowd to retire and slim the organization, but i opted for it, got the financials, and they were better than I thought. SO OFF WE GO! I'm a dual US/UK citizen, and my wife is a travel writer, so her business can move anywhere. Edinburgh is one of her favorite cities, so we are pulling the ripcord and moving. Good idea? Bad idea? Who knows! But the universe aligned to tell us "if you wanna do something big, now's the time." So wish us luck. Time for a grand adventure. /side note; Company also slimming down due to "pivoting to being AI focused". So there's a good chance i get a phone call or email in a couple months begging for me to come back.
item.dc:creator: Skrumblecakes

item.title: TL;DR: The Trump admin is essentially running spyware on every .gov page
item.description:
(or "figuratively", or "for all intents and purposes", or whatever phrase nitpicking idiots will be satisfied with) The slightly wordier gist: AirBNB co-founder Joe Gebbia, formerly of DOGE infamy, is doing a bunch of shenanigans on the backend of almost every important US government website. https://thedreydossier.substack.com/p/i-found-a-second-votegov-and-its Don't let the Substack account fool you, the entire article is well sourced and documented.
Sorry the post is all wordy and not an AI clapback meme or yet another week-old political cartoon mocking Trump that's already been posted ten times today. Or it's talking about a conspiracy that's boring and real as opposed to doing grassy knoll theory every time some nutter takes a pop shot at the most hated man on the planet. Banality of evil and all that. Also, anybody who starts talking about how "that's just how websites work, this is nothing hehe luddites", they: A) didn't read the rest of the article, or B) don't want people to read the rest of the article.
item.dc:creator: ipointoutnahtzeesbyreplyingtothem

item.title: 25 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 271
item.description:
Pre-flight checks then making its decision to head out https://www.instagram.com/e.e.gray/reel/DYf4-9vvBUO/
https://www.instagram.com/p/DY2Gj1dRRPb/
~u/neylmasmins
My kitten Vincent cuddling with his aunt and newborn cousins ~u/emergencytower
Snail away, snail away, snail away.
The flow is a gift.
Have a glass of water, clean your teeth and brush your hair. Take a break from negativity.

item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Hi Imgur
item.description: Fp edit: thanks for the kind words BTW, those that was worried and all. Thanks to yall who followed me on twitch wow Hi Imgur. I got some really bad economical news on top of things. As a chronically ill student relying on social aid, I am not receiving that income for the next months. Which means a lot of debt. Well shucks, I'll figure something out. But hey, trying is what matters. Never had a job since I've been sick most my life, so figuring that out is a bit late. If you've seen my art, read my comments, you'd know I'm a streamer. Specifically vtuber. If you wanna support me, my bipolar crash outs, or so... just be a kind person. Say nice things of the art. Celebrating a year streaming my transitioning on Sunday. Maybe I'll see you there on twitch? Edit: for browser users Twitch.tv/cybjester
item.dc:creator: JesJester

item.title: Russian forces appear to be moving additional air defense systems to guard key rear-area supply routes from Ukrainian mid-range strike drones. Seen here, Ukrainian mid-range strike drones destroying those air defense systems:
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Peter Thiel funded Trump, installed Vance, collected $687M in government contracts from their administration, discussed the Antichrist over dinner in Buenos Aires, and fled to his third backup country to avoid a 5% wealth tax. The exits were always ready.
item.description: Peter Thiel — the man who bankrolled Trump, hand-picked JD Vance, and collected $687 MILLION in government contracts from the administration his own protégé runs — has fled the United States. Reason: he might have to pay 5% tax on his billions. HE BUILT THIS HOUSE AND THEN LEFT. This is his THIRD backup country. New Zealand citizenship 2011 — spent 12 DAYS there against a 1,350-day requirement. Malta passport 2022. Now a $12 million Buenos Aires mansion. Meanwhile his company Anduril just signed a $20 BILLION Army contract. He is CASHING OUT AND CLOCKING OUT simultaneously. He hosted a dinner with Argentine economists. Topic of discussion: THE ANTICHRIST. Not lithium reserves. Not trade policy. The man whose AI surveillance company has its tentacles in every US government agency sat down in Buenos Aires to workshop END TIMES THEOLOGY over dinner. I need a fucking minute. Built the movement. Funded the candidates. Grabbed the contracts. Discussed the Antichrist. Then enrolled his kids in Buenos Aires schools because a 5% wealth tax was a bridge too fucking far. New Zealand. Malta. Argentina. The exits were always ready. #PeterThiel #PlanC #BuenosAires #Palantir #EatTheRich #TheAntichrist #ThielMilei #TaxTheRich https://thedeepdive.ca/peter-thiel-buys-buenos-aires-mansion-moves-family-to-argentina/
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge
